# Breejesh Rathod

> Engineering leader and software developer with experience taking products from 0→1 and scaling them 1→100 across fintech, cybersecurity, and enterprise software. This site features technical blog posts, project showcases, and professional experience.

## About

- [Homepage](https://breejeshrathod.com/): Portfolio homepage with introduction, about section, and contact information.
- [Experience](https://breejeshrathod.com/experience): Professional experience across engineering leadership roles in fintech, cybersecurity, and enterprise software.
- [Projects](https://breejeshrathod.com/projects): Featured open-source projects and applications built by Breejesh Rathod.
- [Achievements](https://breejeshrathod.com/achievements): Awards, certifications, and career milestones.

## Blog

- [Running LLMs Locally on Android: Gemma 2B with LiteRT](https://breejeshrathod.com/blog/en/gemma-llm-on-android): How to run Google's Gemma models offline on Android using LiteRT with a real-world NomAI example.
- [NomAI: The Offline Calorie Tracker Powered by Local LLMs](https://breejeshrathod.com/blog/en/nom-ai-showcase): Open-source, offline-first calorie tracking app for Android built with Google Gemma and Jetpack Compose.
- [Handling Database Connections at Scale in Serverless Functions](https://breejeshrathod.com/blog/en/serverless-db-connections): How to avoid database connection exhaustion in AWS Lambda and manage connection pools.
- [Shrinking Your Docker Images: The Power of Multi-Stage Builds](https://breejeshrathod.com/blog/en/docker-multi-stage-builds): Reduce production Docker image size by 90% using multi-stage builds.
- [The Hidden Cloud Tax: Why Your NAT Gateway is Eating Your Budget](https://breejeshrathod.com/blog/en/aws-nat-gateway-vs-nat-instance): Cut AWS costs by switching from NAT Gateway to a self-managed NAT Instance.
- [Zunify: Reimagining the Iconic Zune Player for the Modern Web](https://breejeshrathod.com/blog/en/zunify-music-player): Deep dive into building a typography-focused offline-first PWA music player with Angular 19 and File System Access API.

## Projects

- [NomAI](https://github.com/breejesh/nom.ai): Free, open-source, offline-first calorie tracker for Android using on-device Gemma LLM.
- [Zunify](https://github.com/breejesh/zunify): A beautiful, lightweight, offline-first Zune-inspired music player built with Angular 19 and IndexDB.
